raw_consumer_statement:
I have lots of data that I have provided multiple times to the merchant and the credit card company. In brief I was quoted a removal service to move XXXX from an address in XXXX  to an address in XXXX. The quantity of material that was moved was less than XXXX but once the removal company had my goods loaded on the truck they stated that my goods were XXXX. My goods were then out of my possession and I had to pay an additional {$3100.00} immediately or my goods would be taken. I paid that amount with my american express card who have successfully recovered this for me. They would not unload at the new address until I paid them an additional {$2000.00} in cash. 
My initial deposit for the move was {$630.00} which is the amount I am attempting to get back via the XXXX citi card. The amount I paid in cash is gone unless I personally pursue through the courts as the merchant will not respond to calls, texts or emails. 
My original quote for the move was for {$2300.00} to move XXXX. They actually moved less than XXXX ( evidence provided to Citi and the Merchant ) yet they stated that they moved XXXX and charged me {$5800.00}. I provided evidence that the truck used could not carry what they were suggesting, provided photographic evidence, and provided the details of the unit that the material was held in showing that the merchants claim was bogus. 
Citi are stating that they will not fight the dispute for me because " because you received the services for which you contracted '. This is the latest reason, previously they have advised not enough information/evidence was provided, the submission had gone past the time they could collect, and I had not contacted the merchant. My claim was submitted as soon as my goods were received, I have provided lots of evidence of my attempts to contact the merchant and responded to every response from Citi. Previously on every contact with Citi have verbally advised that my dispute was legitimate and the issue was that VISA were looking for more detail. I can provide you with all of the history and data if needed
